narrative.description: The Atari 2600 port of Sega's isometric classic recreates the fortress assault loop with altitude-based dodging, fuel management, and diagonal scrolling through enemy turrets and fuel depots.
narrative.core_loop: Fly through the isometric fortress, manage fuel by shooting depots, adjust altitude to pass walls, and destroy the Zaxxon robot at the end.

mechanics.map_notes: Diagonal isometric scroll creates depth illusion on the 2600 hardware.
mechanics.expression: Diagonal isometric scroll creates depth illusion on the 2600 hardware.

mechanics.map_notes: Shadow altimeter shows whether the ship clears walls and ground targets.
mechanics.expression: Shadow altimeter shows whether the ship clears walls and ground targets.

mechanics.map_notes: Three fortress sorties escalate difficulty before the Zaxxon confrontation.
mechanics.expression: Three fortress sorties escalate difficulty before the Zaxxon confrontation.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship destroyed on wall contact or sustained fire.
mechanics.expression: Ship destroyed on wall contact or sustained fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Limited lives with restart at sector beginning.
mechanics.expression: Limited lives with restart at sector beginning.

mechanics.map_notes: Laser fires continuously while button held.
mechanics.expression: Laser fires continuously while button held.

mechanics.map_notes: Fortress walls require precise altitude changes to pass.
mechanics.expression: Fortress walls require precise altitude changes to pass.

mechanics.map_notes: Turrets emit angled bullet streams across the playfield.
mechanics.expression: Turrets emit angled bullet streams across the playfield.

mechanics.map_notes: Zaxxon robot repeats a learnable sweep-and-fire pattern.
mechanics.expression: Zaxxon robot repeats a learnable sweep-and-fire pattern.

mechanics.map_notes: Missile launches preceded by brief targeting flashes.
mechanics.expression: Missile launches preceded by brief targeting flashes.

mechanics.map_notes: Final robot requires hitting a narrow weak point repeatedly.
mechanics.expression: Final robot requires hitting a narrow weak point repeatedly.

mechanics.map_notes: Sector boundaries act as implicit checkpoints between fortresses.
mechanics.expression: Sector boundaries act as implicit checkpoints between fortresses.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Zaxxon (Atari 2600) through its core shooter loop.
